response.justification: Candidate has genuine geospatial domain experience through GISCollective and Green Map work, plus distributed/low-latency systems exposure from Sociomantic. However, modern C++ experience is limited to a brief 2014-2015 role at National Instruments, and there is no Rust experience. Recent work is firmly in TypeScript/Node.js territory, which is a significant gap for a senior C++ routing-pipeline role.
strengths: Hands-on geospatial/GIS experience building map data platforms
Distributed, low-latency systems background (Sociomantic, millions of req/sec)
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development
concerns: Modern C++ experience is dated (2014-2015) and not commercially recent
No navigation/routing systems or production map-tile pipeline experience
